description: An operator needs to optimize the run times for pumps in the water distribution network to minimize energy costs while maintaining required water pressure.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the electricity Time-of-Use (TOU) rate schedule.

expected_outcome.expected: System gets the on-peak and off-peak electricity prices.

nodes.task_description: Get the 24-hour water demand forecast for the service area.

expected_outcome.expected: System retrieves the hourly water demand forecast.

nodes.task_description: Generate an optimal pump schedule that prioritizes running pumps during off-peak electricity hours to fill storage tanks.

expected_outcome.expected: System creates a 24-hour schedule for each pump station.
